diagrams.title: Air Pollution Cycle
diagrams.description: Shows how pollutants are released into atmosphere and their effects
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete cycle of air pollution from source to impact

diagrams.title: Biomagnification in Food Chain
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how pollutants concentrate at higher trophic levels
elements: Humans at top consume large fish (highest concentration)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how toxins accumulate up the food chain and affect humans

diagrams.title: Greenhouse Effect Mechanism
diagrams.description: Shows how greenhouse gases trap heat in Earth's atmosphere
diagrams.purpose: Understand climate change mechanism and its causes

diagrams.title: Solid Waste Management Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows preferred methods of waste management from most to least desirable
diagrams.purpose: Learn proper waste management priorities for environmental protection

visuals.title: Sources Impacts Preventive Measures And Public Health Aspects
visuals.description: Visual diagram for sources impacts preventive measures and public health aspects
